verses.text: Topa in kei kiangah thu hong gen a
“Mihing ahi Ezekiel aw, Taia khuapi tamlawhna kah la khat sa in
Tuipi gei-ah omin tuipi dunga mite tawh sumlei sumzuakna a nei khuapi tungah Topa Pasian keimah in ka gen thute hih bangin gen in: “Taia khuapi aw, na melhoihna na kisaktheihpih hi
Nangma inn pen tuipi hi a, nang hong lamte in teembaw hoih bangin hong bawl uh hi
A sing zat dingun Senir Mual-a om taksingte zang uh a, na puankhai khuam dingin Labanon-a om taamtak singte zang uh hi
Nangmah hawhna dingin Bashan tawsaw singte la uh a, Grik tuikulh panin a kila taaksante tawh na sual ding bawl uh a, saiha pak tawh nang hong zem uh hi
Egypt gam saihadial puan a kizemte tawh na puankhai kibawl a, gamlapi pek panin zong kithei thei hi. Saipras tuikulh panin a kingah puan hoihpente, kumpi mel puante tawh na tungkhuh kibawl hi
Sidon leh Arvad khuapi mite in nang hong hot uh a, misiam mahmahte in nang hong hawl uh hi
Nang hong lem lettamate pen Gebal khuapi mi khutsiam mahmahte ahi uh hi. Tuipi tungah a pai teembaw nasemte khempeuh in na sumbuk hong zuan uh hi
“Persia gam, Lud gam, leh Put gammite in nangma galkap hong sem uh a, na sungah a lumte uh leh a siklukhute uh a khai uh hi. Amaute in nangma tungah minthan'na hong tun'pih uh hi
Arvad gam galkapte in na kulh cing uh a, Gamad gammite in na tausangte cing uh hi. Amaute in na kulh tungah a lum uh a khai uh hi. Nang a hong etlawmsak mite pen amaute ahi uh hi
“Tarshish gammite tawh sumlei sumzuakna-ah na kizom uh a, na van tampite hong lei-in ngun, sik, dal, leh haknawte hong pia uh hi
Javan gammite, Tubal mite, leh Meshek mite in zong sumlei sumzuakna-ah nang tawh kizopna nei uh a, na vante hong leina-in sila dingin mite, leh sumngo beelte hong pia uh hi
Bethtogarmah gammite in zong vante hong leina-in vanpua sakolte, sakol galkapte, leh late hong pia uh hi
Rods gammite in zong nang tawh sumzuakna-ah kizopna nei uh a, tuipi gei-a om gam khempeuhte in na van hong leina-in saiha leh ningsing hong pia uh hi
Edom mite in zong na van tampi hong lei uh hi. Van leina-in emerald suangmanpha, puansan, a kizem puante, saihadial puan hoihte, suangkhi, leh ruby suangmanphate hong pia uh hi
Judah leh Israel gammite in zong na van leina-in mangbuh, oliv thau, leh theipal, khuaizu leh sing namtui tuamtuamte hong pia uh hi
Damaskas khuapi in zong na vante tampi tak hong lei a, a man dingin Helbon gama piang leenggahzu, tuumul kang, a kihuansa sik, taksing, leh thalsingte hong pia hi
Dedan mite in na van hong leina-in sakol dapphahte hong pia uh hi
Arabia mite leh Kedar gam ukte in tuuno, tuutal, leh keeltal tawh na van hong lei uh hi
Sheba leh Raamah sumbukte in na van leina-in singnamtui hoihpente, suangmanphate, leh kham hong pia uh hi
Haran, Kanneh, Eden, Asshur, leh Khilmad khuapite in zong nang tawh sumlei sumzuakna-ah kizopna hong nei uh hi
Amaute in nang kiangah puan manpha mahmahte, puansan, a kizem puante, sualphah puante, leh limtakin a kiheek khauhual hoih nam khempeuh hong zuak uh hi
Nangma vante ahih leh teembaw lianpente pawl in a honhonin hong pua uh hi. “Nang pen van a dim pua-in tuipi tungah a pai teembaw lianpi tawh na kibang hi
Nang hong hotte in tuipi thukna gamlapi-ah hong hot uh a, nisuahna huihpi in tuipi laizangah nang hong mutsia hi

Tua bangin nang na siat ni ciangin a tam mahmah na van khempeuh na sungah a om teembaw nasemte khempeuh, na lettamate leh na sumbuk mite khempeuh, na sungah a om na galkap khempeuh, a vekpi-in nang tawh tuipi sungah tummang khin uh hi
Teembaw nasem tuikiate' kikona in tuipi geiteng a thawn hi
“Teembaw dangah a tuang mi khempeuh kumkhia uh a, a vekpi-un tuipi gei-ah pai uh hi
Nangma hangin nakpi takin kap uh a, a lu uh leivui thehin vut lakah a bual uh hi
Nangma hangin a lu uh mettol uh a, dahna limin puanhampi silh uh a, na sa lua-in a kap uh hi
Amaute in nang hong tamlawh uh a, ‘Tuipi sungah a daicipsuak Taia khuapi, kua dang tawh kitehthei ding a, ama thuak bang kua in thuak ngei ahi hiam
Na sumbuk vante tuipi tungah a pai ciangin minam khempeuh' tangsapna na cingsak hi. Nangma van hauhna in kumpi dangte hauhlawh hi
Tu-in tuipi tungah na sia a, tuipi thuk sungah na kiasuk hi. Na vante leh na mi khempeuh tuipi sungah nang tawh maimangta hi,’ hong ci ding uh hi
“Tuipi gei-ah a teng mi khempeuh in lamdang hong sa ding uh hi. A kumpite uh zong lau mahmah ding uh a, a maiput uh laumai ding uh hi
Tu-in nang a maimang paisuak na hita a, nangma tuah bang a tuahkhak ding uh leitungah a om sumbuk dang khempeuh lau-in ling uh hi,” a hong ci hi.
